title: SecureFusion SF1.bundle Memo Decoded
description: Decoded form of the SF1.bundle binary memo (50 bytes total). This schema describes the parsed representation; the on-chain form is hex-encoded raw bytes per spec/memo-format.md §3.

bundleHash.description: Lowercase hex SHA-256 over the canonicalised event manifest (32 bytes).

eventId.description: Event UUID (16 raw bytes on chain, big-endian).

ingestSource.description: Producing-platform code. SecureFusion v1: 1=fleetfusion (single value); 2-127 reserved for future SecureFusion-defined platforms; 128-255 vendor-specific.

channelCount.description: Number of channels in the event.
